modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to edit document in SharePoint due to checkout error.

full_description_text: 
The user was attempting to edit a document in SharePoint while using Internet Explorer on a Windows machine. However, they encountered an error message stating that the file is checked out by another user, specifically indicating "USDLOCAL\user.name." This issue persists even though other users can successfully check out and edit the same document. Additionally, the user mentioned that this problem arose after a recent Windows 10 update, suggesting a potential link between the update and the SharePoint functionality.
